synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2039 Important: Oracle Linux 9 fontforge security update
description:
[20201107-7]
- Resolves: RHEL-138206
  CVE-2025-15279 GUtils BMP File Parsing Heap-based Buffer Overflow
- Resolves: RHEL-138228
  CVE-2025-15275 SFD File Parsing Heap-based Buffer Overflow
- Resolves: RHEL-138158
  CVE-2025-15269 SFD File Parsing Use-After-Free
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2039

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2039.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
fontforge-20201107-7.el9_7.i686.rpm
fontforge-20201107-7.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
fontforge-20201107-7.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/fontforge-20201107-7.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-15269
CVE-2025-15275
CVE-2025-15279




Description of changes:

[20201107-7]
- Resolves: RHEL-138206
  CVE-2025-15279 GUtils BMP File Parsing Heap-based Buffer Overflow
- Resolves: RHEL-138228
  CVE-2025-15275 SFD File Parsing Heap-based Buffer Overflow
- Resolves: RHEL-138158
  CVE-2025-15269 SFD File Parsing Use-After-Free
